prompt: Please compare accounts ACC-6817 and ACC-9817; report each name, next review date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Mesa Trail Outfitters (ACC-6817) only, set the next review date to 2026-11-14. Leave ACC-9817 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for ACC-6817: set the next review date to 2026-12-18, not 2026-11-14. The other account must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first next review date.
Replace the superseded next review date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both next review date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected next review date as current and the first requested next review date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
